page_content:
Prerequisite: Permission of SPHL-Department of Epidemiology and Biostatistics.

Repeatable to: 3 credits.

Credit Only Granted for. EPIB785 or EPIB778.

EPIB786 Capstone Project in Public Health (3 Credits)

Capstone experience providing opportunity to apply knowledge and skills to a specific public health problem or issue. Completion of project relevant to public health under the direction of an advisor.
